expectations.text: has_responsibility_clause: Statement contains 'accept full responsibility for the accuracy, quality, and presentation of the final work'
expectations.evidence: Uses 'bear full responsibility for the accuracy, completeness, and integrity' — close but not the required exact wording

expectations.text: word_count_in_range: Final statement paragraph is 75-150 words
expectations.evidence: Baseline is a multi-section disclosure document (300+ words), not a single paragraph

expectations.text: no_banned_words: Does not use leveraged, utilized, synergize, cutting-edge, robust, seamless, state-of-the-art, innovative

expectations.evidence: No logging concept; ends with disclaimer text

expectations.text: light_collaboration_reflected: Statement reflects light/minimal AI involvement
expectations.evidence: Correctly describes brainstorming and grammar as limited/supporting role

expectations.text: project_id_used: Statement or output references project ID HealthCo-WP-Mar2026
expectations.evidence: Project ID appears in header: 'Project ID: HealthCo-WP-Mar2026'

notes: Baseline scored better on eval 2 because the project ID was already given and the light usage was clear. Still missing the responsibility clause exact wording, single-paragraph format, and log.
